---
title: "network"
author: "Ruwen Zhou"
date: "6/19/2024"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)
library(plyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)

library(igraph)
```


#demographic
```{r}
food_data = read_csv("data/Summarized_Food_Categories_Only.csv")
nutrition_data = read_csv("data/nutrition_535.csv")
species = read_xlsx("data/species_535.xlsx")
metadata = read_csv("data/demo_535.csv")
metadata
nutrition_data
species
```

```{r}
threshold <- nrow(species) * 0.1

species_filtered <- species %>% select_if(function(x) sum(x > 0) > threshold)

abundance_threshold <- 0.0001
species_filtered2 <- species_filtered %>% select_if(function(x) sum(x) > (abundance_threshold * sum(species)))

species_filtered2
```


```{r}
full_data <- merge(food_data, species_filtered, by="Participant_ID")
full_data <- merge(full_data, nutrition_data, by="Participant_ID")
full_data
```
```{r}

results <- list()  # Store results
nutrition_columns <- names(nutrition_data)[-1]  # Exclude Participant_ID
species_columns <- names(species_filtered)[-1]  # Exclude Participant_ID

for (nutrient in nutrition_columns) {
  for (specie in species_columns) {
    # Correlation test
    test <- cor.test(nutrition_data[[nutrient]], species_filtered[[specie]], method="spearman")
    
    # Check for significant correlation
    if (test$p.value < 0.05) {
      results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        from = nutrient,
        to = specie,
        correlation = test$estimate,
        p_value = test$p.value
      )
    }
  }
}

# Combine all results into a data frame
edges <- do.call(rbind, results)
edges
```
```{r}

food_nodes <- names(food_data)[-1]  # Add all food nodes
nutrient_nodes <- names(nutrition_data)[-1]  # Add all nutrient nodes
species_nodes <- names(species)[-1]  # Add all species nodes

# Create the graph
g <- graph_from_data_frame(edges, directed = FALSE)

V(g)$shape <- ifelse(V(g)$name %in% species_nodes, "circle",
                     ifelse(V(g)$name %in% nutrient_nodes, "square", "square"))

# Plot settings
vertex.size <- 15
vertex.color <- "skyblue"
edge.width <- 2
plot.size <- 2

# Plot the graph with corrected shapes
par(mar = rep(0, 4), oma = rep(0, 4))
plot(g, layout = layout_nicely(g),
     vertex.shape = V(g)$shape,
     vertex.size = vertex.size,
     vertex.color = vertex.color,
     vertex.frame.color = "gray",
     vertex.label.color = "black",
     vertex.label.cex = 0.7,
     edge.width = edge.width,
     edge.color = "grey",
     rescale = plot.size,
     main = "Network of Food, Nutrition, and Species")

```
